prompt: Survival pressure proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Call controls risk when survival pressure does not require a fold or raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits the tournament cue set, so the line preserves equity without risking more than this pressure read can justify.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Calling fits better when survival pressure is high and your hand can still realize equity without risking tournament life on a thin raise. This is a controlled continue, not a spot to force more chips in with only a marginal edge.
